testcase.name: getServiceOrderRequestDetailsbyOptional_v3

failure.message: expected [{"ServiceOrderDetail":{"Success":true,"Data":[{"ServiceOrder":{"Id":"SORD00000000002","Description":"deposit and transfer","LocationId":"WATER002","ScheduledDateTime":"1997-07-15T00:00:00","RequestedDateTime":"1997-07-15T16:46:00","EquipmentId":"","Status":"Completed"},"Customer":{"Id":"CUSTOMER007","Name":"Miss Sally E MacKenzie","Type":"Individual","Status":"Former"},"Request":{"Id":"","Description":""},"RequestedBy":{"Id":"CUSTOMER007","Name":"Miss Sally E MacKenzie","Type":"Individual"},"MoveInCustomer":{"Id":"CUSTOMER014","Name":"Test Name","Type":"Individual","Status":"Current"},"CommentLine":[{"Id":1,"Description":""},{"Id":2,"Description":""},{"Id":3,"Description":""},{"Id":4,"Description":""},{"Id":5,"Description":""},{"Id":6,"Description":""}],"Task":[{"Id":"TASK012","Description":"Deposit required-water","Sequence":1000,"Ordered":0,"Completed":1,"ScheduledDateTime":"1900-01-01T00:00:00","EmployeeId":"","EquipmentId":"","CompletedDate":"1997-07-15T16:46:00"},{"Id":"TASK020","Description":"Deposit payment -watre","Sequence":1100,"Ordered":0,"Completed":1,"ScheduledDateTime":"1900-01-01T00:00:00","EmployeeId":"","EquipmentId":"","CompletedDate":"1997-07-15T16:46:00"},{"Id":"TASK001","Description":"Meter reading-water","Sequence":1200,"Ordered":0,"Completed":1,"ScheduledDateTime":"1900-01-01T00:00:00","EmployeeId":"MINA0001","EquipmentId":"","CompletedDate":"1997-07-15T16:46:00"},{"Id":"TRANSFER","Description":"Property transfer","Sequence":1300,"Ordered":0,"Completed":1,"ScheduledDateTime":"1900-01-01T00:00:00","EmployeeId":"CARN0001","EquipmentId":"","CompletedDate":"1998-01-15T16:50:00"}],"Udf":[],"ServiceOrderDrillbackLink":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=&Srv=DESKTOP-QU86F3Q&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=ServiceOrder&LocationID=WATER002&ServiceOrderNumber=SORD00000000002&CogsDrillback=1","MoveInDrillbackLink":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=&Srv=DESKTOP-QU86F3Q&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=MoveInServiceOrder&ServiceOrderNumber=SORD00000000002&LocationID=WATER002&BillToCustomerName=Test%20Name&CustomerID=CUSTOMER014&CogsDrillback=1"}],"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"ServiceOrderDetail":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"No validation schema defined","Level":3}]}}]
